steps.title: Set up the equation with the target value
Isolate the exponential term
steps.content:
Subtract 7 from both sides:
$$240 = 240\left(\frac{53}{52}\right)^{t-15}$$
Divide both sides by 240:
$$1 = \left(\frac{53}{52}\right)^{t-15}$$

steps.title: Recognize the exponential property and solve
steps.content:
Any positive base raised to the power of 0 equals 1. Since $\left(\frac{53}{52}\right)^{t-15} = 1$, the exponent must be 0:
$$t - 15 = 0$$
$$t = 15$$
The cephalopod population was estimated at 247 in month 15.
